---
title: "2026 DBMI Symposium"
format:
  revealjs:
    css: theme.scss
---

## Notes

- Use abstract as guideline
- No more than 20 slides
- Intro (<3min)
- Data and methods (~2 min)
- Results (<4 min)
- Conclusion (<2 min)
- Acknowledgements (<1 min)

## Introduction
		
- test
![](./images/filtering-w-pop-sv-databases.png)
